use_cases: Displaying success, error, warning, or info messages to users
Showing dismissible notifications with optional close buttons
Presenting status updates with customizable icons and appearances
Creating toast-style alerts with different severity levels
Building alert banners with solid, outline, light, or stroke visual styles
ai_summary: A flexible alert and notification component from the sean0205/rating package with multiple variant types (secondary, primary, destructive, success, info, warning, mono), appearance styles (solid, outline, light, stroke), and size options (sm, md, lg). Features slot-based architecture for icons and close buttons, making it suitable for displaying contextual feedback messages in SaaS, fintech, and general web applications.
